0 AND 71
1 AND 02
2 AND 13
3 AND 24
4 AND 35
5 AND 46
6 AND 57
7 C 7n

Applying to 01010111
Input
I 0 = 0
I 1 = 1
I 2 = 0
I 3 = 1
I 4 = 0
I 5 = 1
I 6 = 1
I 7 = 1
Output
0 AND 71 = AND(I 7,I 1) = AND(1,1) = 1
1 AND 02 = AND(I 0,I 2) = AND(0,0) = 0
2 AND 13 = AND(I 1,I 3) = AND(1,1) = 1
3 AND 24 = AND(I 2,I 4) = AND(0,0) = 0
4 AND 35 = AND(I 3,I 5) = AND(1,1) = 1
5 AND 46 = AND(I 4,I 6) = AND(0,1) = 0
6 AND 57 = AND(I 5,I 7) = AND(1,1) = 1
7 C 7n = NOT(1) = 0

\boxed{10101010}
